'''Viper wasps''' were indigenous to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. These stinging [[Insect/Legends|insects]] lived inside of vines and would swarm if disturbed. The viper wasp's venom, in significant quantities, could cause cramps, diarrhea, yellowing of the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], numbness of the extremities, pustules on the mucus membranes, and hormone disruption. Smoke could be used to drive the insects away.

[[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] accidentally cut the vines of a viper wasp hive while searching the forest for a cure for [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]]. A [[Smoke grenade/Legends|smoke grenade]] saved him from their attack without any serious injuries.
